'''Nyasko''' was a terrestrial<ref name="DES" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE Nyasko">{{CSWECite|II|397|Nyasko}}</ref> located in the [[Nyasko system/Legends|Nyasko system]]. It constituted a part of the [[Colunda sector/Legends|Colunda sector]], a [[Sector/Legends|subsector]] of the [[Phelleem sector/Legends|Phelleem sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA Nyasko" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], a [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]]<ref name="DES" /> of Imperial [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] was stationed on Nyasko.<ref name="CSWE Nyasko" />

At some point, the high marks earned by the individual [[Deppo]] at an [[Engineer/Legends|engineering]] school led to him being assigned to the Nyasko battalion.<ref name="DES" /> The unit's frequent suppression of Rebel-related uprisings<ref name="CSWE Colunda">{{CSWECite|I|134|Colunda sector}}</ref> resulted in a lot of work for Deppo in repairing wrecks of vehicles that had either been sabotaged or damaged in battle.<ref name="DES" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nyasko was first mentioned in the [[1993]] ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'', which was authored by [[Michael Allen Horne]] and published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="DES" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Nyasko [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square S-7.<ref name="TEA Nyasko" />
